scenario.name: UAS Proxy Auth Then Answer
scenario.send: SIP/2.0 407 Proxy Authentication Required [last_Via:] [last_From:] [last_To:];tag=[pid]AuthTag00[call_number] [last_Call-ID:] [last_CSeq:] Proxy-Authenticate: Digest realm="sipp-auth", nonce="fixednonce", algorithm=MD5, qop="auth" Content-Length: 0

SIP/2.0 200 OK [last_Via:] [last_From:] [last_To:] [last_Call-ID:] [last_CSeq:] Contact: <sip:[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=udp> Content-Type: application/sdp Content-Length: [len]
v=0 o=user1 53655765 2353687637 IN IP4 [local_ip] s=- c=IN IP4 [local_ip] t=0 0 m=audio [media_port] RTP/AVP 0 101 a=rtpmap:0 PCMU/8000 a=rtpmap:101 telephone-event/8000 a=fmtp:101 0-15
